title: Solar Sales Representatives and Assessors
description: Contact new or existing customers to determine their solar equipment needs, suggest systems or equipment, or estimate costs.

tasks.text: Prepare proposals, quotes, contracts, or presentations for potential solar customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select solar energy products, systems, or services for customers based on electrical energy requirements, site conditions, price, or other factors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide customers with information, such as quotes, orders, sales, shipping, warranties, credit, funding options, incentives, or tax rebates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather information from prospective customers to identify their solar energy needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate potential solar resources or solar array production for a particular site considering issues such as climate, shading, and roof orientation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Generate solar energy customer leads to develop new accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical information about solar power, solar systems, equipment, and services to potential customers or dealers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess sites to determine suitability for solar equipment, using equipment such as tape measures, compasses, and computer software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Take quote requests or orders from dealers or customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or review detailed design drawings, specifications, or lists related to solar installations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create customized energy management packages to satisfy customer needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop marketing or strategic plans for sales territories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Demonstrate use of solar and related equipment to customers or dealers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
